title: Rahul Gandhi calls PM Modi ‘Mehangai Manav’, slams govt on petrol, diesel price surge: ‘Attack on public's pockets’
description: Rahul Gandhi criticized the government for recent fuel price hikes, claiming they burden citizens post-elections. He labeled Prime Minister Modi as 'Inflation Man' for failing to address economic concerns amid rising global oil prices, which now see petrol exceeding ₹100 per litre in many areas.
